# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservices-dr
spec:
  host: microservices.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-pa
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-linkerd-bootstrap
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd-linkerd-bootstrap.linkerd.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 8086
      name: tls
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-deployment
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: microservices
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
```
